summary.description:
Today, cooler for the feels like temperature (down 4.2°C), outside temperature (down 4.1°C), and inside temperature (down 1.8°C).

The past week and month had observable variation in the amount of wind (up 21 miles), dew point temperature (up 8.1°C), feels like temperature (up 8.1°C), and outside temperature (up 7.9°C) when compared to today.

summary.summary: Inside; anticipate mild and comfortable temperatures. Outside; the temperature will feel pleasantly warm. Also, neither too dry nor too humid and light winds will prevail. A few light raindrops may fall, the sky may alternate between sunny and overcast, and sunlight will be very intense and bright. The weather will likely remain the same.
